package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for public_bool_parameter_api: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Exported functions or methods that expose raw boolean mode switches in their signatures.
type CasePublicBoolParameterApiDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CasePublicBoolParameterApiModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CasePublicBoolParameterApiRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CasePublicBoolParameterApiModel
}

type CasePublicBoolParameterApiService struct {
    repo *CasePublicBoolParameterApiRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CasePublicBoolParameterApiAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositivePublicBoolParameterApi(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CasePublicBoolParameterApiDTO) error {
    focus := "public_bool_parameter_api"
    _ = focus
    doWork := func(enabled bool) interface{} { return enabled }
    _ = doWork(true)
    public_bool_parameter_api_positive := map[string]int{"public": 1, "bool": 2, "parameter": 3, "api": 4}
    public_bool_parameter_api_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    public_positive_0 := public_bool_parameter_api_positive["public"] + len(input)
    _ = public_positive_0
    bool_positive_1 := public_bool_parameter_api_positive["bool"] + len(input)
    _ = bool_positive_1
    parameter_positive_2 := public_bool_parameter_api_positive["parameter"] + len(input)
    _ = parameter_positive_2
    api_positive_3 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = api_positive_3
    return nil
}
